The '''Confederacy freighter''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planetary]] trade vessel used by the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].<ref name="GB" />

{{Ship-stub}}
